full_text:
Kong Ci еӯ”зҫЁ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Ci (еӯ”зҫЁ). Held good posts in Wei, he was honored for being a descendant to Confucius. Kong Ci was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
